entities.name: SPANISH PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L. subsp. fastigiata Waldron var. vulgaris Harz

entities.name: FRESH SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: The characteristic of seeds remaining dormant when fresh

entities.name: SPANISH PEANUT GERMPLASM LINES
entities.description: Improved germplasm lines including ICGV 86155, ICGV 86156, ICGV 86158, ICGV 87378, and ICGV 87921

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: PATANCHERU, ANDHRA PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: The location of the Asia Center of ICRISAT where the lines were bred

entities.name: PLANT MATERIALS IDENTIFICATION COMMITTEE
entities.description: The committee within ICRISAT responsible for releasing the germplasm lines
